---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new cleanup target or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem or unmet need. (e.g., "I have 20 GB of X caches that mac-cleanup doesn't clean.")

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like mac-cleanup to do.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought of.

## Target Paths

If applicable, list the specific directories/files you'd like cleaned:

```bash
~/path/to/target
~/another/path
```

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references.
